narrative:
Bowling Green 4-A (precinct in Wood County) has 1,120 registered voters, with 43.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.2%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.7 percentage points.
